# services.sabnzbd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.sabnzbd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.sabnzbd.allowConfigWrite` | `boolean` | By default we create the sabnzbd configuration read-only, which keeps the nixos configuration as the single source of truth. If you want to enable configuration of sabnzbd via the web interface or use options that require a writeable configuration, such as quota tracking, enable this option. |
| `services.sabnzbd.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to config file (deprecated, use `settings` instead and set this value to null) |
| `services.sabnzbd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the sabnzbd server. |
| `services.sabnzbd.group` | `string` | Group to run the service as |
| `services.sabnzbd.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the sabnzbd web interface |
| `services.sabnzbd.package` | `package` | The sabnzbd package to use. |
| `services.sabnzbd.secretFiles` | `list of absolute path` | Path to a list of ini file containing confidential settings such as credentials. Settings here will be merged with the rest of the configuration (with the secret settings taking precedence in case of conflicts, and files that occur later in this list taking precedence over those that occur earlier). Recommended settings: - misc.api_key, misc.nzb_key, misc.username, misc.password - misc.email_account, misc.email_pwd if email alerts are enabled - servers.<name>.username, servers.<name>.password |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (ConfigObj type)` | The sabnzbd configuration (see also [sabnzbd's wiki](https://sabnzbd.org/wiki/configuration/4.5/configure) for extra documentation) |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.bandwidth_max` | `string` | Maximum bandwidth in bytes(!)/sec (supports prefixes). Use in conjunction with `bandwidth_perc` to set a bandwidth limit. Empty string disables limit. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.bandwidth_perc` | `signed integer` | Percentage of `bandwidth_max` that sabnzbd is allowed to use. 0 means no limit. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.cache_limit` | `string` | Size of the RAM cache, in bytes (prefixes supported). Sabnzbd recommends 25% of available RAM. Empty means no cache. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.email_endjob` | `(one of 1, 0, 2) or (one of "always", "never", "on error") convertible to it` | Whether to send emails on job completion. Values are: 0, 'never' -- Never 1, 'always' -- Always 2, 'on error' -- On error |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.email_from` | `string` | 'From:' field for emails (needs to be an address) |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.email_full` | `boolean` | Whether to send alerts for full disks |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.email_rss` | `boolean` | Whether to send alerts for jobs added by RSS feeds |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.email_server` | `string` | SMTP server for email alerts (server:host) |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.email_to` | `string` | Receiving address for email alerts |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.enable_https` | `boolean` | Whether to enable HTTPS for the web UI |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.host` | `string` | Address for the Web UI to listen on for incoming connections. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.html_login` | `boolean` | Prompt for login with an html login mask if enabled, otherwise prompt for basic auth (useful for SSO) |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.https_cert` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the TLS certificate for the web UI. If not set and https is enabled, a self-signed certificate will be generated. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.https_key` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the TLS key for the web UI. If not set and https is enabled, a self-signed certificate will be generated |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.inet_exposure` | `(one of 1, 3, 2, 4, 5, 0) or (one of "api (add nzbs)", "api (full)", "api (no config)", "api+web (auth needed)", "api+web (locally no auth)", "none") convertible to it` | Restrictions for access from non-local IP addresses. Values are: 0, 'none' -- no access 1, 'api (add nzbs)' -- api access only, only add nzb files 2, 'api (no config)' -- api access only, config changes not allowed 3, 'api (full)' -- api access only, full api access 4, 'api+web (auth needed)' -- api and web ui, login required always 5, 'api+web (locally no auth)' -- api and web ui, login required from non-local IPs only |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.misc.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port for the Web UI to listen on for incoming connections. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.ntfosd` | `open submodule of attribute set of (ConfigObj type)` | NotifyOSD settings |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.ntfosd.ntfosd_enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable NotifyOSD alerts. Does not really make sense in a server environment, hence we default to false despite upstream's default true. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers` | `attribute set of (open submodule of attribute set of (ConfigObj type))` | Usenet provider specification |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.connections` | `signed integer` | Number of parallel connections permitted by the server. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.displayname` | `string` | Human-friendly description of the server |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Enable this server by default |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.expire_date` | `null or string` | If Notifications are enabled and an expiry date is set, warn 5 days before expiry. This setting does not automatically disable the server. Expected format: yyyy-mm-dd |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.host` | `string` | Hostname of the server |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.name` | `string` | The name of the server |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.optional` | `boolean` | In case of connection failures, temporarily disable this server. (See sabnzbd's documentation for usage guides). |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the server |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.priority` | `signed integer` | Priority of this servers. Servers are queried in order of priority, from highest (0) to lowest (100). |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.required` | `boolean` | In case of connection failures, wait for the server to come back online instead of skipping it. |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.ssl` | `boolean` | Whether the server supports TLS |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.ssl_verify` | `(one of 2, 0, 3) or (one of "allow injection", "none", "strict") convertible to it` | Level of TLS verification. Supported values: 3, 'strict' -- strict (normal) verification 2, 'allow injection' -- allow locally injected certificates 0, 'none' -- no verification |
| `services.sabnzbd.settings.servers.<name>.timeout` | `signed integer` | Time, in seconds, to wait for a response before attempting error recovery. |
| `services.sabnzbd.stateDir` | `string` | State directory of the service under /var/lib/ |
| `services.sabnzbd.user` | `string` | User to run the service as |
